data.title: 62 indicted in Taiwan for laundering $339M from crypto scam in Cambodia, linked to transnational criminal org.
data.description: Prosecutors have brought charges against 62 individuals for their suspected involvement with Prince Group, which has been classified as a transnational criminal organization by the U.S. Department of Justice.

data.title: GeoComply announced a unified identity platform for Brazil's iGaming market featuring KYC verification and anti-fraud measures.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia & Rio de Janeiro, GeoComply has introduced a unified identity platform catering to Brazil's iGaming market. This platform combines KYC verification, anti-fraud intelligence, and geolocation compliance in a comprehensive package. With Brazil being a rapidly evolving market, operators face unique hurdles that generic solutions cannot address. This offering is tailored to meet the specific needs of Brazil's regulated iGaming sector.

data.title: AgentPass rebrands as Paz.ai, linking e-commerce to AI shopping agents like ChatGPT. San Francisco-based startup changes name to reflect mission.
data.description: A startup located in San Francisco has recently adopted a new name to better align with its goal of linking e-commerce inventories with AI shopping assistants such as ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, and Perplexity. Known as AgentPass, Inc., this company focuses on agentic commerce infrastructure. This announcement was made on March 4, 2026.

data.title: Gitlab beats Q4 earnings, revenue at $260M (+23% YoY). Analysts cut price targets. Shares fall despite upbeat results.
data.description: GitLab Inc's (NASDAQ: GTLB) shares dropped despite reporting strong fourth-quarter earnings, with total revenue at $260 million, a 23% increase year-on-year, exceeding the $252 million consensus. Subscription revenue reached $234 million, a 26% year-on-year increase, surpassing the $227 million consensus. Analysts had mixed reactions with Howard Ma reducing the price target from $60 to $50, Nick Altmann from $32 to $30, Kingsley Crane from $70 to $40, Mike Cikos was down from $50 to $32, Blair Abernethy from $55 to $43, while Jonathan Ruykhaver maintained a Neutral rating and a $30 target._gitlab's Total revenue guidance fell below consensus at $1.120B. Fed deals slipped out of Q3, and enterprise deals experienced delays with NRR growth down to 118%.

data.title: Southwire invests in Verdigris Technologies, showcasing dedication to AI and next-gen computing. $ amounts undisclosed.
data.description: Carrollton, GA - On March 4, 2026, Southwire Company LLC, the top wire and cable manufacturer in North America, declared a significant investment in Verdigris Technologies, Inc. This move showcases their dedication to next-generation computing and AI-native environments.

data.title: Olga Camargo named CEO & Chief of Financial Empowerment at Prosperity Rise Mindset in 2026.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Chicago, Prosperity Rise Mindset, a firm specializing in financial leadership education, revealed their mission to assist organizations, leaders, and communities in fostering confident and resilient financial futures. The company aims to achieve this goal by providing comprehensive training programs and resources.

data.title: Dow Jones slips amid Iran, tariff news. Nvidia, Tesla bounce back. Moderna soars. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline due to developments involving Iran and tariffs. Despite this, Nvidia and Tesla saw a rebound in their stock prices following recent declines. The Dow managed to maintain a higher position amidst the news about Iran and Trump's tariffs. Additionally, Moderna exhibited significant growth in its stock value. This update was covered live with a focus on the market activities of the day.

data.title: HTeaO in TX appoints Jerry McClain as VP of Store Development and Brian Aga as SVP of Operations to support national expansion. #IcedTea #Franchise
data.description: HTeaO, a prominent iced tea franchise based in Fort Worth, Texas, has disclosed the appointment of two crucial executive leaders: Jerry McClain as the Vice President of Store Development and Brian Aga as the Senior Vice President of Operations. This development comes subsequent to the recent naming of Chris Phillips as the new Chief Financial Officer, demonstrating HTeaO's dedication to establishing a robust organizational framework that will facilitate strategic and continual national growth. These appointments are part of a comprehensive strategy to bolster the company's leadership team as it aims to expand further across the country.

data.title: Toyota and ELA Taubert end successful U.S. tour with Vegas show. Thousands of fans enjoyed the pop-up performance.
data.description: In Plano, Texas on March 4, 2026, Toyota concluded a successful collaboration with Colombian singer-songwriter ELA Taubert during the U.S. segment of her "Preguntas a las 11:11" tour. The partnership culminated in an exclusive pop-up event in Las Vegas, Nevada, where thousands of fans were treated to an intimate performance by the artist.
